questions.question_text: Write short notes on the following with relevant examples. Self-advertising as a strategic tool for personal branding. What to listen and why? Barriers to critical thinking. BATNA, WATNA and ZOPA
Imagine you are about to join a new office. What key soft skills would you focus on developing to ensure a smooth transition and build a positive impression in the workplace?
What are the common indicators of stress? Explain various techniques to manage time and how they benefit in managing stress.

Describe the distinction between intergroup and intragroup conflict by drawing on your personal experiences. Additionally, identify which of the five styles from the Thomas-Kilmann model would be most effective in resolving this conflict.
Define social etiquette and provide a detailed explanation of the three types of professional etiquette
Describe how engineering students can apply Bloom’s Taxonomy to improve their self-learning strategies. Provide suitable examples for each level.
What do you understand by Problem-solving? Explain with the help of PAR Formula.
How can each component of the ACES method be used effectively to persuade someone? Explain with the help of a suitable example.

Your friend Sheena is preparing to appear for a job interview with her dream company, ASoft. How can you help her prepare for the interview successfully? Additionally, what are some key steps she should take during and after the interview to distinguish herself from her fellow candidates?
